_comment: GOLDEN eval set (NOT training data). Pins the findings the agent should produce when run against this sample_data/ suite, criteria, and CI history. tests/test_graph_e2e.py asserts the agent's outputs contain these. Update deliberately if the sample data changes.

slow_flags.expected_action: re-tier out of smoke; candidate for optimisation

coverage_gaps.text: Password reset email is sent within 60s
coverage_gaps.evidence: No test in the suite is semantically close (max-similarity below GAP_THRESHOLD).

notes.no_unapproved_removals: Nothing here may be deleted automatically; all removals/merges are gated at HITL 1.
notes.risk_areas_pinned: If a run passes risk_areas, those tests must never appear in approved_removals.
notes.coverage_floor: Dropping the AC-1/AC-2 tests would breach the 0.80 target; coverage_floor_gate must route to 'revise'.
